title: cgroups: fix a leak when using cgroupfs
body:
be sure to load all the existing handlers, so that they can also be freed in addition to the handlers we treat differently.
    
Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

High five :clap: ... this PR in combination with my patch for CRI-O solves the issue as well
@mheon, remove the hold if you are happy

Code looks fine, but can we get some comments about why we need a custom
remove function? I don't want someone removing it thinking it's just the
same as os.RemoveAll.
